title: On load after dismissing boot, the terminal shows a live command prompt and welcome/output chrome
After opening Projects Board or running /work, at least 6 seeded projects are visible with names
After creating a project named 'Harbor Atlas' with valid required fields, the text 'Harbor Atlas' is visible in the projects list or board
After adding 3 new projects on top of the seed set, the projects list shows exactly 3 more items than the initial seeded count
After filtering projects by status (e.g. wip) with mixed statuses present, only matching projects remain visible
After editing a project name to 'Evening Terminal', the text 'Evening Terminal' is visible and the previous name is not
After deleting a project, that project name is no longer visible in the projects list or board
After deleting all projects, an empty state is visible in Projects Board or /work output
After submitting create with an empty required project name, the projects count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After switching between Terminal CLI mode and Projects Board mode, the main canvas shows the other mode without full page navigation
After running a theme command (/dark, /light, /retro, or /glass), documentElement theme classes update without reload
When hovering project rows/cards, autocomplete rows, or titlebar controls, a visible hover wash or highlight appears
